title: sci-paper
description: A scientific-journal-style pdfTeX paper: siunitx + mathtools + pgfplots (all ONLY in the academic tier) drive the §5.4(a) static \usepackage scan to preselect + mount academic BEFORE pass 1, while natbib + bibtex8 against the plainnat .bst (both in core) resolve \citet/\citep through the full journal pipeline (engine -> bibtex8 -> engine -> engine). The rendered author surnames (Zhang/Rossi from \citet, Nakamura/Okonkwo from \citep) prove the .bbl reached the PDF = citations resolved. This is BOTH the academic-scan proof and the citation acceptance criterion.
